Dashboard Archive: 2026-06-26 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
Today's data shows ADTTF dominating the long-term momentum rankings with a score of 95.5 and rank #1, driven by extraordinary returns across all timeframes—notably a 10,700% return over 10 years and a 278% gain over the past year that substantially outpaces SPY by 258 percentage points. ADTTF exhibits textbook strong momentum with all four moving average indicators in bullish alignment, a "clean" momentum signal at 0.49, and consistent acceleration in returns (each ratio passing threshold checks), suggesting sustained multi-year outperformance. In stark contrast, ATEX ranks second but shows deteriorating momentum quality despite short-term volatility—it posted explosive 6-month returns of 299% but severely underperformed SPY over 5 years (-25.52%) and 10 years (+78% vs SPY's likely 1000%+), with a momentum flag showing "none" for pullback risk and ratio passes dropping to 3 of 4. ATEX's weak correlation to major indices (highest correlation only 0.196 to real estate) and poor long-term relative performance suggest it may be a speculative play catching a short-term wave rather than a secular trend like ADTTF, making these two very different investment profiles despite both appearing on today's list.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
